Web Development

Websites that convert and scale.

Webcore Solutions designs and builds websites for businesses in Dubai and internationally — from marketing sites to high-traffic e-commerce, engineered for performance, SEO and long-term growth.

Our Craft

Built for performance, designed to convert.

Every site we ship is engineered from the ground up — custom design systems, clean componentised code and a relentless focus on Core Web Vitals so your visitors stay and your rankings climb.

  • 98 avg. Lighthouse score

    Performance is a first-class requirement on every build, not a last-minute pass

  • Mobile-first by default

    Designed and tested on real devices — not browser emulators

  • Figma design system included

    Full token library, component docs and brand guide handed to your team

Sites shipped

100%

Web Development

30 daysPost-launch support
What We Build

Every web capability,
under one roof.

From a simple marketing site to a fully custom e-commerce platform — we cover the entire web development stack in-house, end to end.

Business Websites

Fast, responsive, SEO-ready marketing sites engineered to rank, load instantly and convert visitors into customers — built on a solid technical foundation from day one.

E-commerce & WooCommerce

Conversion-tuned storefronts with optimised checkout flows, product discovery and performance at any scale — from boutique shops to high-volume catalogues.

Custom Website Design

Bespoke design systems rooted in your brand identity — not templates. Every component is crafted in Figma and refined until it feels unmistakably yours.

WordPress Development

Custom themes, bespoke plugins, Gutenberg blocks and complex third-party integrations — every WordPress build is headless-ready and editor-friendly.

Performance & Core Web Vitals

Sub-second loads, perfect Lighthouse scores and optimised CWV — because speed is a conversion strategy, not a technical afterthought.

Accessibility (WCAG 2.2)

Inclusive, keyboard-navigable, screen-reader tested experiences that meet WCAG 2.2 AA — expanding your audience and reducing legal exposure.

Deliverables

What you walk away with.

  • Design system in Figma (tokens, components, docs)
  • Production-ready, version-controlled codebase
  • CMS setup with editor training session
  • SEO baseline — sitemap, schema, meta layer
  • Analytics & tag manager configuration
  • Performance audit report (Lighthouse / CWV)
  • 30-day post-launch support included
Tech Stack

Built on the right tools.

We choose frameworks based on your project's requirements — not trends. Every stack decision is documented with clear trade-offs so you're never locked in.

Next.js
React
TypeScript
Tailwind
WordPress
WooCommerce
Shopify

Performance by default. Every build is measured against Core Web Vitals and Lighthouse before launch. We don't ship until the numbers are right.

Our Process

From brief to live site —
five clear steps.

A structured build process refined across 180+ web projects.

01

Discovery

Goals, audience, competitor audit and content inventory.

02

Design

Wireframes, design system and high-fidelity Figma mockups.

03

Build

Componentised frontend, CMS integration, API connections.

04

QA

Performance, accessibility, cross-browser and device testing.

05

Launch

Deploy, monitor, iterate — ongoing support available.

Client Stories

What our clients say.

"Our new site loads in under a second and our conversion rate jumped 40% in the first month. The team's attention to detail — from animations to accessibility — is genuinely elite."

Ahmed Khalil

Founder, Dunescape

"We moved from a sluggish WordPress theme to a custom Next.js build. The difference is night and day — both for our users and for our developers maintaining it."

Sarah Lin

CTO, NorthPeak

"The Figma design system they built has transformed how fast we can iterate. We launch new landing pages in hours, not weeks — and they look consistent every time."

Connor James

Managing Director
